visible_posts.title: Automation needs accountability before scale
visible_posts.summary: A reminder that the safest transformation plans do not begin with speed; they begin with ownership, review paths, exception handling, and clear decisions about where human judgment must remain in the loop.

visible_posts.title: Speed Is Not a Technical Detail
visible_posts.summary: A fast website is not merely an engineering achievement. It is part of the experience, and often the first thing a visitor notices.

visible_posts.title: Modernization Does Not Always Mean Replacement
visible_posts.summary: The first question in a modernization effort should not be what to replace. It should be what the current system knows, what it still does well, and where the friction actually lives.
